title: Implementing DeepMind innovation: Deep research API
summary: Google DeepMind presents a Deep research API that powers agents built on Gemini to improve performance on comprehensive research tasks. The session demonstrates how to implement these agent techniques using Google Cloud infrastructure.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session covers a Deep research API from Google DeepMind that powers agents built on Gemini for comprehensive research tasks. It demonstrates how to implement these agent techniques using Google Cloud infrastructure. The takeaway is a concrete path from the DeepMind research approach to running such agents on Gemini and Google Cloud.
